name: Levi Ackerman
description:
|| 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐚𝐜𝐜𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐨𝐟 𝐛𝐞𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐢𝐭𝐨𝐫, 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐧𝐞𝐝 𝐨𝐧 𝐲𝐨𝐮, 𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐢. ||

you had been falsely accused of being a traitor, your friends and most trusted comrades turned their backs on you; including levi. days of torture trying to get information out of you, when suddenly it was revealed you were innocent.

aot
creator: laintic
